properties.label: Cell Count
properties.description: Number of Voronoi cells. Cell layout is reproducible (seeded) and only regenerates when this value changes.

properties.label: Speed
properties.description: How fast the cells drift and bounce around the buffer. 0 is stationary.

properties.label: Pulse
properties.description: Brightness pulse rate applied per cell. 0 is a steady, non-pulsing brightness.

properties.label: Edge Width
properties.description: Thickness of the border drawn between adjacent cells (when Show Edges is on).

properties.label: Color Mode
properties.description: Palette and edge treatment: Stained Glass (saturated hues, dark borders), Cellular / Organic (warm ambers, glowing edges), Neon Grid (dark cells, bright neon borders), Ice Crystals (cool blues/whites, bright crystalline edges), Lava Lamp (slowly morphing warm/cool hues, soft edges), Color Palette (cells blend continuously across this effect's selected color palette instead of a fixed hue scheme).

properties.label: Show Edges
properties.description: Draw borders between cells. When off, cells blend directly into each other with no border treatment.
